seo.title: "Trend song" Song Lyrics AAA aka Anbanavan Asaradhavan Adangadhavan
seo.description: Full Trend Song songs lyrics, sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Simbu, Music: Yuvan, Singer(s): Simbu. Trend Song Song Lyrics AAA #AAA #TrendSong #STR #...
seo.keywords: Simbu, Yuvan, Simbu, Trend Song full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Trend Song lyrics snippets, Trend Song WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Trend Song lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of excitement and fun, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

In which movie is this song featured?

The song is from the movie AAA, which stars Simbu.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Simbu and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 30, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Trend Song encapsulates the vibrant energy of youth and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. With Simbu's engaging vocals and Yuvan's infectious music, it creates an atmosphere of joy and excitement. The lyrics reflect a carefree attitude, inviting listeners to embrace the fun and spontaneity of life. Overall, it evokes feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Trend Song is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases Simbu's unique style and Yuvan's catchy beats. This song perfectly captures the essence of celebration and fun, making it a must-listen for party lovers. Dive into the infectious rhythm and let the music take you on a joyful ride!
stanzaMeanings: Something feels new and different, what's happening?
How do I explain what's happening inside me?
Is this love? Is this really love? Oh my God.
I feel like singing, but I don't know how to. The lyrics, music, and tune are all missing.
But I feel like singing and dancing.
I feel like singing something, something else is coming... ahhhhhhhh aaaaiiii
What else is happening? I'm feeling something, I don't know what it is, oh yes, this is love, right? This is love.
This is love, I want more of it.
This is my feeling, girl, I'm in love with you, but you know what? I don't care.
You should always be with me, I don't know if it's just for today or just for tonight, you can love me just for tonight.
Tonight... tonight, tonight, tonight.
Just for tonight, you can love me.
Just for tonight, you can love me (3)
Just for tonight, you can be my girlfriend (2)
Just for tonight, you can be my girlfriend (2) just for tonight, just for tonight.

Look at the power of the fans, see the mass, the blessings of the God are a bit delayed.
Just for tonight, you can love me.
You post your DP, get many likes, when you go live, you get many views, your tweets are a sensation, your love is a different rendition.
Oh my God, they say, looking at you, they fall down.
You are trending, Ashwin mania.
Is there anyone who wants the playful charm of love?
